title: Odd Hills
description: A mod that adds some hills that blend VERY VERY good with natural generation. Gives hidden loot throughout the overworld and the nether whilst keeping that minecraft-native feeling.
body:
# Structures that hide in plain sight.

Your gonna be across the overworld and the nether probably tearing up the dirt around you because you never know if it has loot anymore. And yes, its pre-generated structures that have loot in them that perfectly blend with the ground.
